selection_policy.backend: Ollama / local OpenAI-compatible HTTP where available
selection_policy.scope: Non-MLX-capable first-pass models that are realistic to pull, run, and delete on the Mac mini.

excluded.reason: Too close to or above the comfort zone for a 16GB Mac mini full-suite run.

candidates.notes: General instruction baseline; compare against the MLX Qwen3 4B always-on baseline.
Coding-specialized 7B candidate; tests whether Ollama/GGUF packaging changes the weak MLX 7B result.
Quality coding worker candidate; compare with the MLX 14B leader.
General 8B instruction and tool-use baseline outside the Qwen family.
